summary: Tested new registration+OTP flow. Backend: all 21 tests in test_registration_otp.py passed. Frontend: 2-step wizard renders correctly at mobile viewport 420x900, role picker + inline bilingual validation errors + password strength meter + submit-disabled-until-valid all work. Send OTP transitions to step 2, displays mock-mode banner, resend cooldown counts down from 60s (verified decrement 58→55), verify button disabled until 6 digits, back link and change-details link present. No horizontal scroll on mobile viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: OTP is bcrypt-hashed (never plaintext) and TTL/attempts/cooldown implemented correctly per spec
CSRF-exempt paths correctly extended for the 3 new endpoints
Mock delivery path (RESEND_API_KEY blank) logs to backend stderr and returns mock_delivery:true — behaves as designed
Frontend uses data-testid attributes consistently for all interactive elements — great for maintainability
reg-pw-strength element contains styled child spans so its text_content is fragmented across nodes (not a bug, but worth noting for future test authors — assert on child spans instead)
test_credentials: buyer@kisanbaazar.in / buyer123 (used indirectly via duplicate-email tests in pytest suite)
seed_data_creation: Pytest suite creates and cleans up its own TEST_ users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registration+OTP flow is production-ready pending real RESEND_API_KEY. To e2e verify signup completion, tail /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log for '[EMAIL:MOCK]' after /init call. All data-testids stable per problem statement.
